category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/azimjohn/jprq says JPRQ exposes local servers to the public internet and supports HTTP, SSH, and TCP servers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README section title uses 'JPRQ' at https://github.com/azimjohn/jprq.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation and usage examples.
source_facts.homepage is the official jprq.io site and is used as the service/homepage documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/azimjohn/jprq, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents exposing local servers, HTTP, SSH, and TCP usage.
Official GitHub repository topics include tunneling, tunnel-server, ngrok-alternative, and ngrok-replacement.
